title: Disclosure Test? Bob Lazar on the 'Container' theory

transcript.text: and so my meta conspiracy theory about
the whole thing is that Bob Lazar is not
a pure construct he's not fake he's not
you know maybe he actually did see some
stuff but he was almost a disclosure
test for the program like they wanted to
see what people would would think and
say Bob read something really strange
and disturbing in the briefings that we
have no place to put it it just it's so
it's so far out it's your objection has
been noted okay what does it
say that were're containers that's how
that's how supposedly the aliens look at
us that we are nothing but containers
containers of
containers maybe containers of souls you
can come up with whatever Theory you
want but we're containers and that's how
we're mentioned in the documents
